decision.archive_summary: Earlier validation/testing discussion is resolved. Active topic is the VS Code UX for context visibility: the user wants a status-bar-triggered display that shows context size directly and updates automatically over time, without manual commands or frequent refreshes; acceptable surfaces include an editor view, terminal view, or tail-style live display. Recent assistant turns claim this has been wired up.
decision.reasoning_summary: The conversation is still on the same implementation topic, so relation=continue. The next turn will likely depend on the current implementation/verification state plus the concrete UX requirements in t9, so those should remain available, with t9 also pinned as a compact durable requirement. Older turns about generic validation and self-testing are solved/off-topic relative to the current active implementation and can leave the next-turn raw prompt.
